mapper.select: SELECT A.SLVL_CD , A.SLVL_NM , TRIM(A.SORG_OFFICE_FLAG_YN) SORG_OFFICE_FLAG_YN , A.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD , B.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_NM FROM MST.TB_LVL_CD A , MST.TB_EXTERNAL_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD B WHERE 1=1 AND A.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD = B.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD(+) AND REPLACE(A.SLVL_NM, ' ', '') = REPLACE(#{lvlNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ' ', '') ORDER BY A.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD , A.SLVL_NM
